## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Balance/content tuning
- [ ] Visual/audio asset
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `.\gradlew.bat build` or `./gradlew build`.
- [ ] I updated recipes, loot, models, textures, lang files, and docs where needed.
- [ ] I updated both `en_us.json` and `ru_ru.json` for player-facing text.
- [ ] I considered the input/output/purpose rule from `docs/DESIGN.md`.
- [ ] I added screenshots or clips for visible changes.
- [ ] I listed known risks or unfinished work below.

## Testing Notes

How did you test this?

## Risks / Follow-up

Anything reviewers should watch closely?
